# All State Paving
> Family-owned asphalt paving contractor based in Delaware, Ohio, serving 10 cities across Central Ohio since 1979. Over 40 years of experience and 2,500+ completed projects. Residential, commercial, and agricultural paving services.

## Services
- [Asphalt Paving](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/asphalt-paving): Full-service asphalt paving for residential and commercial properties using premium hot-mix asphalt
- [Commercial Paving](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/commercial-paving-services): Parking lots, shopping centers, office parks, and commercial properties built to handle heavy traffic
- [Residential Paving](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/residential-paving-services): Driveways, walkways, and residential surfaces with proper drainage and curb appeal
- [Driveway Paving](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/driveway-paving-services): Custom driveway installations and resurfacing for a smooth, lasting finish
- [Asphalt Repair](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/asphalt-repair-services): Crack sealing, pothole repair, infrared patching, and surface restoration
- [Parking Lot Paving](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/parking-lot-paving-services): Commercial parking lot construction with proper drainage, base engineering, and ADA compliance
- [Private Roads](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/private-roads-paving-services): Durable private road construction for neighborhoods, developments, and rural properties
- [Farm Lane Paving](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/farm-lane-paving-services): Heavy-duty farm lane surfaces built to withstand agricultural equipment and all-weather use
- [Sealcoating](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/sealcoating-services): Protective sealcoating that extends asphalt pavement life by blocking moisture, UV, and chemicals
- [Line Striping](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/services/line-striping-services): Parking lot striping, ADA markings, fire lanes, and directional arrows

## Service Areas (Central Ohio)
- [Delaware, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/delaware-oh): Company headquarters, Delaware County
- [Columbus, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/columbus-oh): Greater Columbus and Franklin County
- [Dublin, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/dublin-oh): Dublin and western Franklin County
- [Westerville, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/westerville-oh): Westerville and northeastern Franklin County
- [Powell, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/powell-oh): Powell and Liberty Township, Delaware County
- [Sunbury, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/sunbury-oh): Sunbury and Big Walnut area, Delaware County
- [Marysville, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/marysville-oh): Marysville and Union County
- [Marion, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/marion-oh): Marion and Marion County
- [London, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/london-oh): London and Madison County
- [Mount Vernon, OH](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/areas-served/mount-vernon-oh): Mount Vernon and Knox County

- [Contact / Free Estimate](https://www.allstatepavenow.com/contact): Request a free on-site estimate, no obligation

## Key Facts
- Founded: 1979 in Delaware, Ohio
- Family-owned and operated for over 40 years
- 2,500+ projects completed across Central Ohio
- 1,800+ satisfied clients
- Services 10 cities across Central Ohio
- Residential, commercial, and agricultural asphalt paving
- Phone: 1-800-568-9954
- Address: 175 South Sandusky St, Suite 398, Delaware, OH 43015
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 7:30 AM – 7:30 PM
